ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the filter (e.g., lowpass, highpass, bandpass, lowshelf, highshelf) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the filter */,
  "frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency parameter for the filter */,
  "q_description" TEXT /* Description of the Q parameter for the filter */,
  "gain_description" TEXT /* Description of the gain parameter for the filter */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* The sample rate at which the filter operates (e.g., 44100 Hz) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the filter type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the filter type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filter type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the filter type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter configuration */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter type used in the configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the configuration is used */,
  "frequency_value" REAL /* Value of the frequency parameter for the configuration */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Value of the Q parameter for the configuration */,
  "gain_value" REAL /* Value of the gain parameter for the configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_configurations_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., audio engineer, system admin, support staff) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
